mapper.insert:
insert into student (name, no, gender, phone, id_card, is_college, address, degree, graduation_date, clazz_id, create_time, update_time) values
(#{student.name}, #{student.no}, #{student.gender}, #{student.phone}, #{student.idCard}, #{student.isCollege}, #{student.address}, #{student.degree}, #{student.graduationDate}, #{student.clazzId}, #{student.createTime}, #{student.updateTime})
mapper.delete: delete from student where id in #{id}
